emails.subject: Manifest 2026-04-02-001 – Receiving Complete
emails.body_text:
Manifest 2026-04-02-001 receiving complete.

Seal: Intact

Temperature readings:
  Front:  -9.5°F
  Middle: -10.5°F
  Rear:   -13.0°F
  Avg:    -11.0°F

Pallet count: 20

Case count by SKU:
  SC-001: 160
  SC-003: 119
  SC-007: 120
  Total:  399

Lot codes received:
  A-20260327-01 (SC-001)
  A-20260327-02 (SC-003)
  A-20260328-01 (SC-007)

Lot codes match manifest.

Damage observations: One case label torn (SC-001 pallet 3). No breach.

Notes: None.

Proceeding with put-away.

emails.subject: P4 – Receipt Confirmation – 2026-01-07-001 – 2026-01-07
emails.body_text:
Manifest: 2026-01-07-001

Variance: 0
Lot codes: A-20260102-01, A-20260102-02
Status: Received and accepted. Product in H-A.

emails.subject: P3 – Temperature Excursion – 2026-01-21-001 – 2026-01-21
emails.body_text:
Manifest: 2026-01-21-001
Temperature readings: -5°F, -3°F, -8°F (warmest -3°F)
Tier classification: Tier 3
Product disposition: Accepted conditionally

Lot flagged in expiry_tracker (yellow tier). Expedited outbound note added to inventory_master. Please advise on production-side cause.

emails.subject: P3 – Variance Notification – 2026-01-28-001 – 2026-01-28
emails.body_text:
Manifest: 2026-01-28-001
SKU affected: SC-005
Manifest qty: 80 cases
Actual qty: 72 cases
Variance: -8 cases (-10%)
Classification: Moderate

Receipt held open pending response. Please provide explanation or credit.

emails.subject: Re: P3 – Variance Notification – 2026-01-28-001 – 2026-01-28
emails.body_text: Confirmed — SC-005 was short-packed at Waco. Credit adjustment will be issued. Expected credit note by EOD today.

emails.subject: P2 – Temperature Excursion – 2026-02-24-001 – 2026-02-24
emails.body_text:
Manifest: 2026-02-24-001
Temperature readings: +3°F, +5°F, +2°F (warmest +5°F)
Tier classification: Tier 4
Product disposition: Quarantine — entire receipt moved to H-Q pending assessment.

Please advise on disposition decision.

emails.subject: Re: P2 – Temperature Excursion – 2026-02-24-001 – 2026-02-24
emails.body_text: Re-measurement confirmed at -18°F after stabilization. Authorize conditional acceptance. Move to H-A and flag in expiry_tracker.

emails.subject: P3 – Credit Claim – Damage Class 2 – PKG-01-PO-1101 – 2026-03-04
emails.body_text:
PO: PKG-01-PO-1101
Damage class: Class 2
Affected cases: 4
Damage description: Outer carton torn/hole on side panel. Inner pint containers confirmed dry and intact on visual inspection.
Total claim amount: $24.00

Request credit note or replacement for 4 affected cases.

emails.subject: P2 – Variance Notification – DRY-01-PO-0561 – 2026-03-16
emails.body_text:
PO: DRY-01-PO-0561 (Heartland Bakery Supply)
SKU affected: Waffle cones / cookie shells
PO qty: 40 cases
Actual qty: 26 cases
Variance: -14 cases (-35%)
Classification: Major

Receipt held open pending investigation. Request immediate review.

emails.subject: Re: P2 – Variance Notification – DRY-01-PO-0561 – 2026-03-16
emails.body_text: Heartland confirmed short-shipment. Replacement order placed — scheduled delivery 2026-03-23.
